translations.en: I want to consume less sugar.
translations.fr: Je veux consommer moins de sucre.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn dùng ít đường hơn.
translations.hi: मैं कम चीनी खाना चाहता हूँ.
translations.id: Saya ingin mengonsumsi lebih sedikit gula.
translations.ro: Vreau să consum mai puțin zahăr.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative; sentence subject (1st person singular).
Modal auxiliary (1sg, present) expressing volition; selects the infinitive at clause-final position.
Quantifier determiner modifying the noun ‘Zucker’, indicating a smaller amount.
Common mass noun; direct object of ‘konsumieren’.
Main lexical verb in infinitive; complement of the modal ‘will’, taking ‘Zucker’ as its object.

sentences.target: Wir sollten die Nachrichten bewusster konsumieren.

translations.de: Wir sollten die Nachrichten bewusster konsumieren.
translations.en: We should consume the news more mindfully.
translations.es: Deberíamos informarnos de manera más consciente.
translations.fr: Nous devrions nous informer de façon plus réfléchie.
translations.it: Dovremmo informarci in modo più consapevole.
translations.ko: 우리는 뉴스를 더 신중하게 접해야 해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们应该更有意识地看新闻。
translations.yue: 我哋應該更有意識咁睇新聞。
translations.pt: Devemos consumir as notícias de forma mais consciente.
translations.he: כדאי שנצרוך חדשות בצורה מודעת יותר.
translations.vi: Chúng ta nên tiếp nhận tin tức một cách có ý thức hơn.
translations.ar: ينبغي أن نتعامل مع الأخبار بوعي أكبر.
translations.nl: We zouden het nieuws bewuster moeten volgen.
translations.hi: हमें खबरें अधिक सोच-समझकर पढ़नी चाहिए.
translations.nb: Vi bør forholde oss mer bevisst til nyheter.
translations.id: Kita sebaiknya menyimak berita dengan lebih sadar.
translations.sv: Vi bör ta del av nyheterna mer medvetet.
translations.ro: Ar trebui să ne informăm mai conștient.
translations.da: Vi bør forholde os mere bevidst til nyhederne.
translations.ja: ニュースをもっと意識して見るべきです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative; sentence subject (1st person plural).
Modal auxiliary (1pl, present) expressing recommendation/obligation; selects the infinitive.
Definite article determining ‘Nachrichten’.
Plural common noun; direct object of ‘konsumieren’.
Comparative adverb modifying the manner of ‘konsumieren’.
Main lexical verb in infinitive; complement of the modal ‘sollten’.

sentences.target: Meine Schwester möchte kaum Fleisch konsumieren.

translations.de: Meine Schwester möchte kaum Fleisch konsumieren.
translations.en: My sister wants to consume hardly any meat.
translations.es: Mi hermana quiere comer muy poca carne.
translations.fr: Ma sœur veut manger très peu de viande.
translations.it: Mia sorella vuole mangiare pochissima carne.
translations.ko: 제 여동생은 고기를 거의 안 먹고 싶어 해요.
translations.ru: Моя сестра хочет есть совсем мало мяса.
translations.pt: Minha irmã quer comer pouquíssima carne.
translations.he: אחותי רוצה לאכול כמעט בלי בשר.
translations.tr: Kız kardeşim neredeyse hiç et tüketmek istiyor.
translations.vi: Em gái tôi muốn ăn rất ít thịt.
translations.ar: أختي تريد أن تأكل القليل جدًا من اللحم.
translations.nl: Mijn zus wil bijna geen vlees eten.
translations.uk: Моя сестра хоче майже не їсти м’яса.
translations.hu: A lánytestvérem alig akar húst enni.
translations.hi: मेरी बहन बहुत कम मांस खाना चाहती है.
translations.pl: Moja siostra chce jeść bardzo mało mięsa.
translations.el: Η αδερφή μου θέλει να τρώει ελάχιστο κρέας.
translations.nb: Søsteren min vil knapt spise kjøtt.
translations.id: Adik saya ingin nyaris tidak makan daging.
translations.sv: Min syster vill knappt äta kött.
translations.ro: Sora mea vrea să mănânce foarte puțină carne.
translations.cs: Moje sestra chce jíst jen velmi málo masa.
translations.da: Min søster vil næsten ikke spise kød.
translations.fi: Siskoni haluaa syödä hyvin λίγo lihaa.
translations.ja: 私の妹は肉をほとんど食べたくない。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying ‘Schwester’, marking possession.
Common noun; sentence subject in nominative.
Modal auxiliary (3sg, present) expressing desire; selects the infinitive.
Adverb of degree limiting the extent of the action; modifies ‘konsumieren’.
Common mass noun; direct object of ‘konsumieren’.
Main lexical verb in infinitive; complement of the modal ‘möchte’.

sentences.target: Viele Leute konsumieren oft Videos unterwegs.

translations.de: Viele Leute konsumieren oft Videos unterwegs.
translations.en: Many people often consume videos on the go.
translations.es: Mucha gente suele ver videos mientras se desplaza.
translations.fr: Beaucoup de gens regardent souvent des vidéos en déplacement.
translations.it: Molte persone guardano spesso video mentre sono in giro.
translations.ko: 많은 사람들이 이동 중에 자주 동영상을 봐요.
translations.zh-Hans: 很多人经常在路上看视频。
translations.yue: 好多人成日喺路上睇片。
translations.ru: Многие люди часто смотрят видео на ходу.
translations.pt: Muitas pessoas costumam assistir a vídeos enquanto se deslocam.
translations.he: הרבה אנשים לעיתים קרובות צופים בסרטונים תוך כדי נסיעה.
translations.tr: Birçok kişi yolda sık sık video izliyor.
translations.vi: Nhiều người thường xem video khi đang di chuyển.
translations.ar: الكثير من الناس غالبًا ما يشاهدون مقاطع فيديو أثناء التنقل.
translations.nl: Veel mensen kijken vaak video's onderweg.
translations.uk: Багато людей часто дивляться відео в дорозі.
translations.hi: बहुत से लोग चलते-फिरते अक्सर वीडियो देखते हैं.
translations.pl: Wiele osób często ogląda filmiki w drodze.
translations.el: Πολλοί άνθρωποι συχνά βλέπουν βίντεο καθ’ οδόν.
translations.nb: Mange ser ofte videoer på farten.
translations.id: Banyak orang sering menonton video saat sedang bepergian.
translations.sv: Många tittar ofta på videor i farten.
translations.ro: Mulți oameni se uită des la clipuri video जब sunt pe drum.
translations.cs: Mnoho lidí často sleduje videa na cestách.
translations.da: Mange ser ofte videoer på farten.
translations.fi: Monet katsovat usein videoita liikkeellä ollessaan.
translations.ja: 多くの人が移動中によく動画を見ます。

tokens.explanation: Quantifier determiner modifying ‘Leute’, indicating large quantity.
Common plural noun; sentence subject.
Finite lexical verb (present, 3rd person plural); main predicate of the clause.
Adverb of frequency modifying ‘konsumieren’.
Plural common noun; direct object of ‘konsumieren’.
Adverb indicating the circumstantial context (while travelling); modifies the verb phrase.
